chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-5737 of 2023 Along with C.P. No. D-2863, 3389, 3672, 4053, 4729, 4887 & 5520 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 8758/2024 2. For hearing of main case 26-02-2025 Mr. Uzair Qadir Shoro Advocate for the Petitioner in CPD-5737/2023 & D-3672/2024 Mr. Yasir Hameed Advocate for the Petitioner Ms. Sadia Bajwa Samina Advocate for Petitioners Mr. Haroon Dugal Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Akram Tariq Advocate for Respondent No.2, 3 & 4 Mrs. Masooda Siraj Advocate for Respondent Agha Shahid Majeed Khan Advocate for Respondent Port Qasim Collectorate along with Mr. Muhammad Zakir Advocate Mr. Muhammad Rizwan Saeed Advocate for Respondent No.8 Mr. Muhabbat Hussain Awan Advocate for Respondent Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, Advocate for Respondent Mr. Muhammad Siddiq Advocate for Respondent Sardar Zafar Hussain Advocate for Respondents Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Tariq Aziz, Assistant Collector Customs Per learned counsel finalization of assessment is pending because of these petitions. Learned counsel state that it may be just and proper for the Respondent department to finalize the assessment in accordance with law after providing opportunity of hearing to the Petitioners and pending the aforesaid no further coercive action be taken against the Petitioners. Learned counsel for the Respondent department articulate no cavil to the aforesaid and states that these petitions may be disposed of in above terms. Order accordingly. Office is directed to place copy of this order in each connected file. Judge Judge Amjad PS
